data.raceComments: {"comment":"A BM78 Handicap is run over 1350m for 75k, and in an even affair, we like 2. HELL TO PAY, who has hit his straps this year, turning his consistent form into winning form. He was well ridden to score here just over 3 weeks ago, and he is now ready to tackle some tougher Saturday racing. He drops 2kg from his last run and is poised to repeat the dose. 8. SAVAGERY VIBE can't be faulted with her form this season, and she has only been narrowly beaten in her last couple of starts since graduating to this class. She has a superior draw this time, and also drops 1.5kg in weight. Hard to beat, especially on a wet track. 18. GRAMMAR LAD capped off some improving form with a comfortable win here a fortnight ago. He has been patiently handled and should cope with another slight rise in class. He is nicely placed carrying 2kg less, and he is another with strong each-way claims. 16. LUNAITE treks North after 2 starts in NSW, and her stable will have her ready to run a big race. Each-way.","runners":[2,8,18,16],"exclusive":true}
